nasb.text: Then Shimei arose and saddled his donkey, and went to Gath to Achish to look for his servants. And Shimei went and brought his servants from Gath.

esv.text: Shimei arose and saddled a donkey and went to Gath to Achish to seek his servants. Shimei went and brought his servants from Gath.

cnv.text: 於是示每起來，預備好自己的騾子，就往迦特亞吉王那裡去尋找他的僕人。示每去了，又把他的僕人從迦特帶回來。

ccb.text: 就备上驴到迦特的亚吉那里找他的仆人，并把他们带了回来。
